title: Black Villager
description: Black villagers are now in Minecraft!
body:
**Ever wanted to have black villagers in Minecraft? Then this resource pack is for you! This resource pack changes the texture of villagers — every villager will look like this.**

![Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b79bc70622b93be0c7a3a24a07f82982c743914.png)

_Supports Fresh Animations_
